calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Alan J. Sherwood, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Pui S. Tung.
Default was entered against defendant on April 15, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 15, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 2, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Citibank, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Pui S. Tung as follows:

Damages/Principal - $107,956.33.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $385.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $111,166.33.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
